violations.description: NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - CLEAN (1 pts): Outsides of the grey tubs with dry rice flour etc.noted not clean.
NON FOOD CONTACT SURFACES - DESIGN (1 pts): Reach-in cooler wire shelving noted with vinyl coating (corrosion) not in good repair.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling in the kitchen noted in need of cleaning.
IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In - use utensil noted being stored with the handle laying in the rice.

CROSS CONTAMINATION (5 pts): Raw meat noted above rice and onions. Also raw chicken noted above raw pork. Raw meats are to be stored according to required final cooking temperature. From bottom to top: chicken beef pork seafood and all pre-cooked/ready-to-eat on top. Corrected on the spot.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Ceiling in the kitchen noted with some staining and in need of deep cleaning or replacement.
